Iran-US Escalation Sends Freight Rates Soaring, Threatens Indonesia’s Trade
body: Iran-US tensions disrupt shipping lanes, tripling freight costs and raising risks for Indonesia’s trade, inflation and manufacturing sector

title: IDX Loses $12.4 Billion in Value Amid Iran Conflict and Oil Price Surge
body: IDX market cap falls Rp 211t this week as geopolitical tensions and oil prices rise, with continued foreign outflows.

title: West Sumatra Restricts Entry of Alfamart, Indomaret to Boost Local Economy
body: West Sumatra limits expansion of national retail chains to protect SMEs and promote local economic growth.

title: IDX Flags Eight Firms with High Ownership Concentration in First Disclosure
body: IDX names eight firms with highly concentrated ownership, flagging potential liquidity risks in first-ever disclosure list.

title: OJK Flags Listed Firms with High Ownership Concentration
body: OJK to launch list flagging firms with concentrated ownership, enhancing transparency and helping investors assess liquidity risks.

title: KB Bank Swings to Profit After Rp 6 Trillion Loss
body: KB Bank posts Rp 66.6b profit in 2025 after Rp 6.3t loss, driven by better asset quality, margins and lower provisioning costs.

title: Indonesian Carriers Seek Higher Ticket Caps Amid 72% Fuel Price Jump
body: Indonesian airlines seek fare hikes after jet fuel prices surge over 70%, raising pressure on operating costs and sustainability.

title: Government Targets 30% Buton Asphalt Use in Road Projects as Oil Prices Surge
body: Indonesia plans to boost Buton asphalt use to cut imports and costs as global oil prices rise above $100 per barrel.

title: Jakarta Launches Waste-to-Energy Projects to Tackle Mounting Garbage Crisis
body: Electricity generated from waste-to-energy plants will be sold to state utility PLN at a tariff of $0.2 per kilowatt hour (kWh).

title: Tax Office Logs 10.5 Million Tax Returns Amid Coretax System Glitches
body: Finance Minister Purbaya extends filing deadline amid system bugs.

title: BI Says Indonesia Inflation Cools Within Target
body: BI says Indonesia’s inflation eased to 3.48% yoy in March, staying within target as core prices softened and food supply improved.

title: JCI Slumps 2.19%  After Trump Vows to 'Hit Iran Extremely Hard'
body: JCI fell 2.19% after Donald Trump warned the US could launch major strikes on Iran within two to three weeks.

title: Rupiah Weakens Beyond 17,000 on Geopolitical Strains, Budget Deficit Fears
body: Rupiah closes at 17,002 as US-Iran tensions, oil price surge, and deficit concerns weigh ahead of key US labor data releases.

title: BSA Logistics Prices IPO at Top End, Targets Rp 302 Billion Raise
body: BSA Logistics Indonesia has set its initial public offering price at Rp168 per share

title: Cross-Border QRIS Now Live Between Indonesia and South Korea
body: QRIS payments are now operational between Indonesia and South Korea, boosting tourism and MSME access.

title: ‘Kamsahamnida’: Indonesia Clinches $10.2 Billion Korean Deals
body: Three South Korea-backed deals involve the state energy firm Pertamina.

title: Bali Generates Over Half of Indonesia’s Tourism FX Earnings
body: Bali generates over half of Indonesia’s tourism foreign exchange, underscoring persistent regional gap.

title: Jakarta Records 40.59% Housing Gap, Highest Nationwide
body: BPS Reports 40.59% Housing Gap in Jakarta Underscores Challenge for Prabowo’s 3 Million Plan

title: Antam Gold Extends Rally to Rp 2.92 Million
body: Antam gold rose on Thursday, up 17% year-to-date, while analysts warn global prices may still face a sharp correction.

title: Indonesian Palm Oil Export Up 26.40% Ahead of B50 Biodiesel
body: Indonesia will raise the mandatory palm oil blend in its biodiesel to 50% starting July in response to the Iran-war-induced energy shocks.
